sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n4554" key="a(lmati/as" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἁλμ-ατίας</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n4554.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">person of tripping gait,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Adam.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.52</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
